libmpv vendor record for Lior

Source:
- https://sourceforge.net/projects/mpv-player-windows/files/libmpv/
- Maintainer: shinchiro

Selected package:
- mpv-dev-x86_64-20260301-git-05fac7f.7z

Vendored file:
- vendor/mpv/mpv-2.dll

Selected build date:
- 2026-03-01

Project note:
- Lior vendors libmpv as a fixed Windows binary.
- Upgrades are manual only. Do not add runtime auto-download.
- When upgrading, replace mpv-2.dll, then update this file with the new source and build details.
